description_long: This shotgun features a compact, tactical design with a matte dark green body and a black, textured pistol grip. The main body is robust and angular, with several vent-like cutouts and a short, thick barrel, suggesting a focus on close-quarters use. The trigger is housed within a rounded guard, and a detachable magazine is visible below the receiver, indicating a magazine-fed mechanism. The overall silhouette is modern and utilitarian, with minimal decorative elements and a focus on function. The surface appears to be made of metal with polymer components, giving it a sturdy yet lightweight appearance. The shotgun's compactness and ergonomic grip make it suitable for rapid handling in urban environments.
description: A compact, tactical shotgun with a matte green body, black pistol grip, and detachable magazine, designed for close-quarters use. Its robust, modern build features vented details and a rounded trigger guard.
description_view_0: The shotgun is seen from the muzzle end, showing the barrel opening and the top rail, with the green body and black grip barely visible.
description_view_1: Side view reveals the full profile, including the vented receiver, black pistol grip, rounded trigger guard, and detachable magazine below.
description_view_2: Rear view highlights the back of the grip and the end of the receiver, with the magazine and trigger guard partially visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirrors view 1, showing the other side of the receiver, grip, and magazine, with similar venting and details.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel, short and thick with no visible ribbing or venting along the barrel itself
attribute_trigger_guard_design: rounded, medium-sized trigger guard with a smooth contour and no visible finger grooves or reinforcement
